summary: The New Zealand vs South Africa 5th T20I concluded earlier today with South Africa winning the series 3-2. The Legends League Cricket match between India Tigers and Konark Suryas Odisha is scheduled to start shortly (around 14:00 UTC). The Sheffield Shield Final is set to begin tomorrow, March 26.
